name: ExtensionActorDefinition_DerivedFrom
title: R5: Definition of this actor in another context / IG (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ActorDefinition)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ActorDefinition)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Definition of this actor in another context / IG (new)
element.comment:
Element `ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Definition of this actor in another context / IG
element.definition: A url that identifies the definition of this actor in another IG (which IG must be listed in the dependencies). This actor inherits all the obligations etc. as defined in the other IG.
